commands: echo '  Note:  bypasses Velocity — set ONLINE_MODE=false on your client'
docker run --rm --name kbve-mc-lobby-dev -p 25565:25565 -p 25574:25575 -e EULA=TRUE -e ONLINE_MODE=false -e ENABLE_RCON=true -e RCON_PASSWORD=dev kbve/mc-lobby:latest
docker run -d --name mc-lobby-e2e -p 25574:25575 -p 25566:25565 -e EULA=TRUE -e RCON_PASSWORD=test -e ENABLE_RCON=true -e ONLINE_MODE=false kbve/mc-lobby:latest

echo 'Waiting for MC lobby RCON...' && for i in $(seq 1 300); do if docker logs mc-lobby-e2e 2>&1 | grep -q 'RCON running'; then echo 'RCON ready after '"$i"'s'; break; fi; if [ $i -eq 300 ]; then echo 'Server did not start in 300s'; docker logs mc-lobby-e2e 2>&1 | tail -50; docker rm -f mc-lobby-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit 1; fi; sleep 1; done
RCON_PORT=25574 RCON_PASSWORD=test npx vitest run; EC=$?; echo '--- container logs ---'; docker logs mc-lobby-e2e 2>&1 | tail -50; docker rm -f mc-lobby-e2e 2>/dev/null || true; exit $EC
